native_install_mechanism: GEMINI.md context file loaded at session start

fallbacks.subagents: Sequential self-review in a fresh context window: re-read the task brief and the exact base..head diff package with no implementation context carried over. This is a degraded substitute and MUST NOT be reported as equivalent to an independent reviewer.
fallbacks.task_tracking: Track task state in .wcbs/runs/<run-id>/progress-ledger.jsonl instead of a native task list.
fallbacks.browser_verification: Substitute command-line verification (curl, HTTP status, scripted DOM snapshot) and record rendered-UI evidence as Not Run.

supported_runtime_versions: Gemini CLI with GEMINI.md hierarchical context support
install: Commit GEMINI.md at the repository root. Gemini CLI loads it as hierarchical context.
rollback: Restore the previous revision from version control.
limitations: No independent subagents; reviews degrade to fresh-context sequential passes. No native browser verification.
deprecation: None. Adapter is active and supported.
